title: codereview: metrics sampling EMA alpha inconsistency (busy 1/8 vs rf_health 1/4)
description: spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md:280 - CCP-15.8.5 section specifies α=1/8 for channel_busy EMA but rf_health.rs:150 uses >>2 (1/4) for RSSI/SNR. Must align for consistency. Reference rf_health test vectors.
close_reason: Aligned EMA α=1/4 for channel_busy with rf_health.rs; updated normative sampling section. Verified in 3 codereview passes.
